name: Quick & Easy Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound lean ground beef or turkey sausage, casing removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, cook the meat, stirring until lightly browned.
2. Add the spaghetti sauce, mushrooms and water to the skillet. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, combine the ricotta, egg, salt and pepper.
4. Spoon 1 1/2 cups of sauce into a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish.
5. Top with half the uncooked noodles, all of the ricotta mixture, 1 cup mozzarella, 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, and 1 1/2 cups sauce.
6. Cover with remaining noodles, sauce, mozzarella and Parmesan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
